safe_properties: Exact HTTPS host, tab, site, account, and seller binding
Fresh inventorylist plus independent inventoryitemsite reads
Deterministic confirmation token plus matching environment arm
Exclusive immutable prewrite and postwrite artifacts
No repricing-model fields in the price payload
existing_guarded_price_mechanism.reason: Its only write endpoint is setitmsitevalues for minimum and maximum price fields. It has no reviewed ASIN-mutation contract and must not be modified or invoked for this identity repair.

existing_finite_file_uploader_protocol.reason: The finite uploader implements one-row, content-addressed, one-submit, ambiguity-safe semantics, but its production gate is false, its reviewed DOM contract is null, and its only mutation operation is UPLOAD_MANUAL_ASSIGNMENT. It does not authorize ASIN correction.

read_only_worker.reason: The deployed worker accepts SNAPSHOT_INVENTORY and DISCOVER_MANUAL_MODEL only and has no click, fill, navigation, or write contract.

mechanism_review.selected_future_execution_mechanism: One-row ChannelMAX File Uploader identity-only TSV, executed only through a separately reviewed owner-gated identity adapter or a supervised owner ceremony. The Analyze preview must prove an in-place update of item_id 171030888 and must not create a second row or touch any price/model/inventory field.

identity_evidence.title: Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread Sandwiches, 8oz/4ct - Pack of 6 (24 Sandwiches Total)
identity_evidence.recipe: 24 individual Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread sandwiches sourced as six 4-count retail packs
identity_evidence.conclusion: B0H776M5B5 is the exact live Amazon identity. B0H75VN18Z is historical ChannelMAX residue and must not remain attached to SKU SZ-ASPI-JFAT.

baseline_prewrite_expected.cas_rule: Immediately before Analyze and again immediately before Submit, independently read the selected ChannelMAX account. Abort unless exactly one active row has item_id 171030888, SKU SZ-ASPI-JFAT, old ASIN B0H75VN18Z, and every non-identity value above is unchanged, except for a separately evidenced repricing hold status.
baseline_prewrite_expected.staleness_rule: The baseline snapshot is evidence, not permission. A fresh exact prewrite read is mandatory; any drift produces a new plan and a new confirmation token.

repricing_hold.current_evidence: ChannelMAX reports repricing_status LIVE with Default model and noncanonical bounds 119.68 / 145.33.
repricing_hold.automation_hold: Keep SZ-ASPI-JFAT in HOLD_IDENTITY for every SSCC/price-wave job. The existing 164-row price writer already excludes this SKU.
repricing_hold.channelmax_hold_precondition: Before the ASIN upload, the operator must pause/disable repricing for this exact ChannelMAX row through a separately reviewed supported control and capture a fresh readback proving it is no longer LIVE. No ASIN submit is allowed while repricing_status is LIVE.
repricing_hold.postwrite_hold: The row remains paused after the identity correction. This plan does not write prices. Repricing may be released only by a separate canonical-price plan after the new ASIN mapping is stable and bounds 66.95 / 76.99 are independently verified.
repricing_hold.blocker: No reviewed ChannelMAX repricing-pause mutation primitive or exact persisted hold token is pinned in the current offline artifacts. This is an execution blocker, not a reason to change the identity decision.

rollback.reason: The old ASIN is known to be wrong. Rollback exists only to restore the exact prior ChannelMAX record if the forward change breaks row integrity; it must never restore active repricing or be treated as product truth.
rollback.rollback_gate: Rollback requires its own fresh owner confirmation, a fresh read proving the exact forward result, and proof that the row remains paused. If the forward outcome is ambiguous, read back first; never submit either artifact again until state is known.
rollback.rollback_postcondition: Exactly one quarantined row for SKU SZ-ASPI-JFAT, old ASIN B0H75VN18Z, all old non-identity values preserved, repricing still paused, and the SKU excluded from every price/inventory automation lane.

abort_conditions: Analyze proposes CREATE instead of UPDATE
Analyze does not expose the old and new ASIN mapping unambiguously
Analyze changes item_id, SKU, price, bounds, cost, quantity, inventory, model, or hold status
Analyze reports more or fewer than one row
A second active SZ-ASPI-JFAT row or either-ASIN duplicate exists
The row is still repricing LIVE
Any account, site, seller, or venue binding differs

mutation_fence.before_submit: Persist the exact fresh prewrite snapshot and analyzed-preview evidence, verify their hashes, verify the confirmation binding, acknowledge MUTATION_STARTED, and only then allow one Submit.
mutation_fence.after_possible_submit: Never retry. Record the task receipt and classify the outcome as CONFIRMED_APPLIED, CONFIRMED_NOT_APPLIED, or AMBIGUOUS. An ambiguous result permits read-only reconciliation only.

duplicate_checks: No active SZ-ASPI-JFAT row remains on B0H75VN18Z
No second SZ-ASPI-JFAT row exists on B0H776M5B5
postwrite_readback_gate.failure_decision: AMBIGUOUS_AND_QUARANTINED; do not retry or apply the rollback until read-only reconciliation establishes exact state.

confirmation.use_rule: The token may be consumed only after the plan is regenerated from a fresh prewrite snapshot, the repricing hold token and identity-upload Analyze contract are pinned, the production identity adapter is independently reviewed, and a real owner step-up approval binds the regenerated plan. This offline token identifies the current proposal; it does not bypass those blockers.

execution_blockers: No production-safe ChannelMAX ASIN mutation executor exists in the repository.
The current browser worker is read-only.
The finite File Uploader adapter release gate is false and the reviewed DOM contract is null.
The current mutation contract supports manual min/max assignment, not ASIN identity correction.
No reviewed ASIN-only Analyze preview semantics are pinned to prove UPDATE rather than CREATE.
ChannelMAX currently reports repricing LIVE, and no reviewed pause primitive or exact persisted pause token is pinned.
The detailed ChannelMAX row snapshot must be refreshed before any execution.
